document_api_meta.title: Get FBF MCF Order Status
document_api_meta.env_desc: This API allows you to query the status of **MCF Orders**. When an order has not been shipped, the `consign_orders` field will contain no data; once the order has been shipped, the `consign_orders` field will display the consignment details of the order. If a single package cannot accommodate the entire order (due to carrier restrictions or packaging size limitations), the **FBT** system will split the order into multiple packages for fulfillment, in which case the `consign_orders` field will contain multiple entries corresponding to the respective packages.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: mcf_order_id
request_query_param.desc: A unique ID that identifies different MCF orders

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^mcf_order
response_param.desc: MCF order information

response_param.name: ^^external_order_id
response_param.desc: The corresponding order ID in your OMS.

response_param.name: ^^mcf_order_id
response_param.desc: A unique ID that identifies different MCF orders

response_param.name: ^^consign_orders
response_param.desc: Once the order has been shipped, the `consign_orders` field will display the consignment details of the order.

response_param.name: ^^^id
response_param.desc: `consign order` unique id

response_param.name: ^^^goods
response_param.desc: The goods id and quantity in this consign order.

response_param.name: ^^^^id
response_param.desc: Identifier for goods generated by Fulfilled by TikTok systemgoods id

response_param.name: ^^^^quantity
response_param.desc: The goods quantity in this consign order

response_param.name: ^^^tracking_number
response_param.desc: The tracking number of this consign order. If the order has not yet been handed over to the logistics carrier, this field may be a null value.

response_param.name: ^^^carrier
response_param.desc: The shipping carrier of this consign order. If the order has not yet been handed over to the logistics carrier, this field may be a null value.

response_param.name: ^^^status
response_param.desc:
The status of this consign order

Possible Status Enumerations
1. **PENDING** - Order is pending warehouse processing
2. **HANDLE_BY_WAREHOUSE** - Order is being processed by the warehouse
3. **SHIPPED** - Order has been shipped out from the warehouse
4. **HANDOVER** - Order has been received by the logistics carrier and is in transit
5. **CLOSED** - Order has been closed
6. **LOST** - Order is lost
7. **DAMAGE** - Order is damaged
8. **COMPLETED** - Order has been completed
9. **ABNORMAL** - There is an issue related to this order and cannot be fulfilled

response_param.name: ^^^is_platform_closed
response_param.desc: This field indicates whether a consign order has been canceled by the FBT platform. If the value is true, it means the order has been canceled by the platform; if it is false, it means the order has been canceled by your OMS.

response_param.name: ^^^issue
response_param.desc: This field displays the reason for order stalling. When a `consign order` is in an abnormal status (such as **ABNORMAL**, **LOST**, etc.), specific issue reasons will be shown here.

response_param.name: ^^^shipping_provider
response_param.desc: The shipping carrier detailed informatioin of this consign order. If the order has not yet been handed over to the logistics carrier, this field may be a null value.

response_param.name: ^^^^id
response_param.desc: The shipping carrier unique id.

response_param.name: ^^^^name
response_param.desc: The shipping carrier name.

response_param.name: ^^create_time
response_param.desc: The time when the mcf order is created

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
Order information cannot be retrieved via the mcf_order_id you provided; please check if your ID is correct.

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
scope_list.auth_info: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
